title: automaton-model-sheet
prompt:
A hero-prop / character model sheet for animation production, on a clean plain white studio background.

SUBJECT — extract and render ONLY the GOLD AUTOMATON design from the reference image. Ignore Hephaestus and the industrial background. It is one of a line of identical burnished-gold humanoid automata: a CLASSICAL, SERENE GREEK-STATUE FACE — calm, noble, smooth, blank/closed eyes — on a hammered-gold humanoid body with classical proportions and VISIBLE HAND-WROUGHT SEAMS at the joints. This is the canonical design — clarify and lock it. Resolve any ambiguity toward a clean classical-faced gold figure. It must NOT have a domed or C-3PO-style robot head, NOT a blank featureless mannequin head, NOT any hat, crown, crest or headgear, NOT glowing eyes.

LAYOUT — a multi-angle turntable spread, evenly and identically lit across all views:
- full-body FRONT view
- full-body THREE-QUARTER FRONT view
- full-body BACK view
plus two detail callout panels: a head/face close-up showing the serene classical features, and a close-up of the hand-wrought seams and joint construction.

STYLE — painterly cinematic concept-art rendering matching the reference image's medium: warm burnished gold, painterly brushwork. NOT photoreal, NOT a flat line drawing.

Clean white background, no environment, no other characters, only faint angle markers. 16:9 aspect ratio.
